mapper.select: SELECT id, user_pw, is_active FROM users WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT u.id, u.user_pw, u.is_active FROM users u JOIN employees e ON u.id = e.id WHERE e.emp_num = #{emp_num}
SELECT id, user_pw, is_active FROM users
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET is_active = #{is_active} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE users SET user_pw = #{user_pw} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users (id, user_pw, is_active) VALUES (#{id}, #{user_pw}, #{is_active})
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_pw, is_active FROM users ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
